description_long: This house features a modern, Mediterranean-inspired design with a flat roof and multiple levels, surrounded by lush palm trees and a spacious terrace. The front facade is characterized by large, arched windows and a prominent entryway with double doors, flanked by symmetrical walls and decorative elements. The rear of the house opens onto a wide patio area with outdoor seating and umbrellas, ideal for relaxation or entertaining. The structure includes several balconies and rooftop spaces, providing ample outdoor living areas. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of yellow, giving it a bright and inviting appearance. The overall layout suggests a luxurious, urban residence with a focus on open, airy spaces and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions.
description: A modern, Mediterranean-style house with flat roofs, large arched windows, palm trees, and spacious terraces. The exterior is mainly white with yellow accents, featuring multiple balconies and outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, arched windows, and palm trees lining the terrace.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the multi-level structure, balconies, and a glimpse of the outdoor seating area with umbrellas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide patio, palm trees, and large windows opening onto the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional balconies, rooftop spaces, and the continuation of the terrace and palm trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent double-door entry with steps, arched windows, and a small terrace flanked by decorative columns and palm trees.
